title: Senior Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Manipal Digital Health! We are hiring a Frontend Developer for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
